name: Pork w/ Apples and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 small Granny Smith apples (cored and coarsely chopped)
Parmesan cheese & parsley (for garnish, if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork strips on a rack over a tray. With a vented cover, microwave on HIGH for 1 minute; set aside.
2. In a medium casserole dish, heat oil on HIGH for 1 minute. Add pork, onion, garlic, and paprika. Cover with a vented lid and microwave on MEDIUM for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
3. In a 1-cup measure, stir broth and cornstarch until dissolved. Add to casserole with apples, salt, and ground red pepper. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes, stirring once. Add tomato and cover. Microwave on HIGH for an additional 3 minutes longer, or until apples are tender. Let stand, covered, 5 minutes.
4. To serve, place noodles on a serving plate. Top with pork mixture; toss to combine. Garnish with parsley if using.
